In this training, Dean is going to show you his “Marketing Wagon Wheel” and how you can think through your own wagon wheel and find out where
your traffic is going to come from to land on your landing page. Before we get into more detail on the order page and application page, this is a
necessary training to understand where your ideal clients can be found.
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Write down all the places you believe you could find potential buyers for your small group, workshop or mastermind.
Understand the concept of lowest hanging fruit and why those people are so important if you are doing your first event.
